a.xlink:title: Returns the number of teams that own control points.
Adds a score to the given team.
Sets the number of control points owned by a team.
Returns the global team entity at the given index.
Returns the current amount of resource the given entity has.
Returns the team entity of the given entity.
Returns the number of control points owned by a team.
Returns whether the team index is valid.
Returns the team index of the given entity.
Converts team value into team index.
Converts team index into team value.
